name: Subtl.ai
tagline: Enterprise 'chat with your documents' AI platform
description: Subtl.ai built document Q&A before ChatGPT added the same feature natively. With only $200K in funding, it couldn't survive the platform absorption.
story: Subtl.ai was a Hyderabad-based enterprise AI startup founded in 2019 that let businesses chat with their documents — uploading PDFs, contracts, and reports to ask questions in natural language. It was a useful feature in 2022. By 2024, it was a checkbox. ChatGPT, Claude, and virtually every major AI platform added native document upload and Q&A capabilities. With approximately $200K in total funding, Subtl.ai never found a clear, repeatable niche. Each client required custom integration work, making scaling impossible. The company shut down in July 2025 — one of the clearest examples of a startup building a feature rather than a product, then watching the platforms absorb it.

sources.title: Top AI startups that shut down in 2025
